case_title: ADR SERVICES, INC. VS HOLLAND, GEORGE ESQ.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY ADR SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND, GEORGE ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
